rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use visible identifiers and feature names from the model when defining assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Only include assumptions and guarantees in AGREE annexes when concrete bounds or named constants are provided.
Define boolean range checks using pattern: eq var : bool = x >= min and x <= max.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must use valid AADL component type and implementation scopes.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings in component type contracts.
Do not define assumptions or guarantees without visible or named model elements.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
